## Checklist

- [ ] File is in the correct `prompts/<category>/` directory
- [ ] Front matter includes all required fields
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/validate.js <path>` and it passed
- [ ] Prompt is original and not a duplicate
- [ ] Prompt is genuinely useful (not filler, not harmful)
- [ ] File is named in lowercase kebab-case with `.md` extension
- [ ] Commit message: `feat(prompts): <description>`
